title: Evaluate wine
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Evaluate wine demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Analyse chemical components of wine

pcs.text: Determine chemical components for a particular wine style, and identify testing laboratories
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine chemical components for a particular wine style, and identify testing laboratories?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine chemical components for a particular wine style, and identify testing laboratories.

pcs.text: Take samples of grapes, juice or wine according to standard sampling procedures and laboratory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take samples of grapes, juice or wine according to standard sampling procedures and laboratory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take samples of grapes, juice or wine according to standard sampling procedures and laboratory requirements.

pcs.text: Perform simple wine analysis procedures and record results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform simple wine analysis procedures and record results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform simple wine analysis procedures and record results.

pcs.text: Evaluate and compare results of chemical analyses with desired values to identify potential chemical problems in the winemaking process and any required additions or fining agents
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate and compare results of chemical analyses with desired values to identify potential chemical problems in the winemaking process and any required additions or fining agents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate and compare results of chemical analyses with desired values to identify potential chemical problems in the winemaking process and any required additions or fining agents.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Analyse chemical components of wine

elements.title: Resolve winemaking problems

pcs.text: Evaluate wine or juice using standard laboratory and organoleptic procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate wine or juice using standard laboratory and organoleptic procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate wine or juice using standard laboratory and organoleptic procedures.

pcs.text: Identify the protein stability of a wine using a buttes or heat technique
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the protein stability of a wine using a buttes or heat technique?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the protein stability of a wine using a buttes or heat technique.

pcs.text: Identify the need for cold stabilisation of a wine
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the need for cold stabilisation of a wine?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the need for cold stabilisation of a wine.

pcs.text: Use additives or fining agents to alleviate problems or improve quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use additives or fining agents to alleviate problems or improve quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use additives or fining agents to alleviate problems or improve quality.

pcs.text: Evaluate the effectiveness of additives and/or fining agents used to alleviate problems or improve quality, and adjust their use where indicated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the effectiveness of additives and/or fining agents used to alleviate problems or improve quality, and adjust their use where indicated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the effectiveness of additives and/or fining agents used to alleviate problems or improve quality, and adjust their use where indicated.

pcs.text: Carry out winemaking and handling processes in a hygienic working environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out winemaking and handling processes in a hygienic working environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out winemaking and handling processes in a hygienic working environment.

pcs.text: Identify, record and use cellar operations procedures and instructions during the winemaking process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, record and use cellar operations procedures and instructions during the winemaking process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, record and use cellar operations procedures and instructions during the winemaking process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Resolve winemaking problems

elements.title: Taste and evaluate a wine

pcs.text: Use accepted tasting procedures for tasting the wine
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use accepted tasting procedures for tasting the wine?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use accepted tasting procedures for tasting the wine.

pcs.text: Identify the flavour and aroma components and characteristics of the wine using organoleptic evaluation techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the flavour and aroma components and characteristics of the wine using organoleptic evaluation techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the flavour and aroma components and characteristics of the wine using organoleptic evaluation techniques.

pcs.text: Identify the relative contribution and interaction of wine components to the wine taste, aroma and appearance, using accepted wine description terminology
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the relative contribution and interaction of wine components to the wine taste, aroma and appearance, using accepted wine description terminology?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the relative contribution and interaction of wine components to the wine taste, aroma and appearance, using accepted wine description terminology.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Taste and evaluate a wine

elements.title: Analyse the effect of winemaking techniques on wine

pcs.text: Identify evidence of the winemaking technique in the wine to distinguish it from other influences on the wine
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify evidence of the winemaking technique in the wine to distinguish it from other influences on the wine?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify evidence of the winemaking technique in the wine to distinguish it from other influences on the wine.

pcs.text: Identify faults in the wine attributable to the winemaking technique, and distinguish from bottle age characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faults in the wine attributable to the winemaking technique, and distinguish from bottle age characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faults in the wine attributable to the winemaking technique, and distinguish from bottle age characteristics.

pcs.text: Determine the effect of winemaking techniques on suitability of wine for cellaring
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the effect of winemaking techniques on suitability of wine for cellaring?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the effect of winemaking techniques on suitability of wine for cellaring.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Analyse the effect of winemaking techniques on wine

elements.title: Analyse the effect of site characteristics, vineyard management practices and grape varieties on wine quality

pcs.text: Identify effects of climate in the wine
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify effects of climate in the wine?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify effects of climate in the wine.

pcs.text: Identify site effects on grape quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site effects on grape quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site effects on grape quality.

pcs.text: Identify and evaluate effects of vineyard management practices in the wine in terms of modifications and improvements to be made for the next season
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and evaluate effects of vineyard management practices in the wine in terms of modifications and improvements to be made for the next season?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate effects of vineyard management practices in the wine in terms of modifications and improvements to be made for the next season.

pcs.text: Identify and analyse effects of grape variety on wine flavour
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and analyse effects of grape variety on wine flavour?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and analyse effects of grape variety on wine flavour.

pcs.text: Adjust, document and communicate viticultural production plan for next season to vineyard personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust, document and communicate viticultural production plan for next season to vineyard personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust, document and communicate viticultural production plan for next season to vineyard personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Analyse the effect of site characteristics, vineyard management practices and grape varieties on wine quality

elements.title: Analyse current packaging methods, bottle closure methods and wine labelling laws

pcs.text: Identify the range of wine packaging available and used in the Australian wine industry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the range of wine packaging available and used in the Australian wine industry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the range of wine packaging available and used in the Australian wine industry.

pcs.text: Identify and compare the range of wine bottle closure methods used in the Australian wine industry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and compare the range of wine bottle closure methods used in the Australian wine industry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and compare the range of wine bottle closure methods used in the Australian wine industry.

pcs.text: Identify and interpret current wine labelling regulations and their impact on the wine industry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and interpret current wine labelling regulations and their impact on the wine industry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and interpret current wine labelling regulations and their impact on the wine industry.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Analyse current packaging methods, bottle closure methods and wine labelling laws
